skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: AI-powered video production agent that creates short videos (5-120 seconds) from natural language requests. Handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music automatically.
skill.summary: Professional AI video creation agent for product ads, social media content, brand videos, and explainers with automated creative workflow.
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: Static analyzer flagged 534 patterns across 13 files, but evaluation confirms these are FALSE POSITIVES. Shell command substitution patterns are standard bash scripting (date, stat, basename, jq). Network URLs point to official pexo.ai service. Hidden file access (~/.pexo/config) is standard configuration storage. Environment variable access (PEXO_API_KEY, PEXO_BASE_URL) is expected for API client tools. No malicious intent, credential exfiltration, or suspicious behavior detected. The skill is a legitimate video production agent.

low_findings.title: Configuration File in Home Directory
low_findings.description: Skill reads configuration from ~/.pexo/config containing API key and base URL. This is standard practice for CLI tools but users should ensure config file has proper permissions (600).
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Configuration storage in home directory is standard CLI practice; low risk if file permissions are properly set by user.

low_findings.title: API Key Required in Environment
low_findings.description: Skill requires PEXO_API_KEY environment variable for authentication. Users must obtain API key from pexo.ai service. Key is transmitted to official API endpoints only.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: API key requirement is explicit and expected for authenticated API client; keys sent only to official pexo.ai endpoints.

content.user_title: Create AI-Powered Videos from Natural Language
content.value_statement: Transform your video ideas into professional content without manual editing. Pexo AI Agent handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music automatically - just describe what you want and receive a polished video in 15-20 minutes.
actual_capabilities: Generate 5-120 second videos from natural language descriptions
Support multiple aspect ratios: 16:9 landscape, 9:16 portrait, 1:1 square
Accept image, video, and audio file uploads as reference materials
Handle iterative revisions through conversational feedback
Provide preview options for user selection before final render
Support multiple output formats: MP4 video with embedded audio
limitations: Cannot crawl or access files from web URLs - files must be uploaded directly
Video production requires 15-20 minutes for short videos, longer for complex content
Requires valid Pexo API key and active credit balance
Maximum video duration is 120 seconds per production request

use_cases.title: E-commerce Product Videos
use_cases.description: Create engaging product showcase videos for online stores, marketplaces, and social commerce. Upload product photos and describe the desired style - Pexo generates professional product videos with transitions, music, and text overlays.
use_cases.target_user: Online sellers, e-commerce marketers, brand managers

use_cases.title: Social Media Content Creation
use_cases.description: Produce TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts content at scale. Describe your concept or trend, and Pexo creates platform-optimized vertical videos with appropriate pacing and music.
use_cases.target_user: Social media managers, content creators, influencers

use_cases.title: Explainer and Training Videos
use_cases.description: Convert documentation, scripts, or outlines into clear explainer videos. Upload diagrams or screenshots, provide narration text, and receive a polished training or educational video.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Product Video (Beginner)
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30-second product video for [product name]. Show the product from multiple angles with smooth transitions. Use upbeat background music. Target audience: [describe audience]. Key features to highlight: [list 2-3 features].
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick product showcase for e-commerce listing or social media post

prompt_templates.title: Social Media Trend Video (Beginner)
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a 15-second vertical video for TikTok/Reels about [topic]. Use trending style with quick cuts and dynamic transitions. Music should be [describe mood: energetic/calm/fun]. Include text overlay for key points.
prompt_templates.scenario: Capitalizing on trending topics or challenges for social engagement

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Asset Brand Video (Intermediate)
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 60-second brand story video. I'm uploading 5 product photos and 1 logo file. Sequence: open with logo, showcase each product with smooth transitions, end with call-to-action screen. Style: modern and minimalist. Music: corporate inspirational. Aspect ratio: 16:9 for YouTube.
prompt_templates.scenario: Comprehensive brand video combining multiple visual assets

prompt_templates.title: Iterative Revision Workflow (Advanced)
prompt_templates.prompt: I've reviewed the preview options. Select option B and apply these changes: (1) Slow down the opening transition by 2 seconds, (2) Replace the current music with something more upbeat, (3) Add a fade-out effect at the end, (4) Increase text size for the feature callouts. Keep the same overall pacing.
prompt_templates.scenario: Refining video output through targeted revision feedback

output_examples.input: Create a 20-second vertical video showcasing our new running shoes. Show energy and movement. Target: Instagram Reels.
output: Preview options will be available for selection
Final deliverable: 20-second vertical MP4 (9:16 aspect ratio) with motion transitions and upbeat music

output_examples.input: Make an explainer video from this flowchart image. Walk through each step clearly with smooth zoom transitions between sections.
output: Video request submitted with image reference
Processing: flowchart explainer with zoom transitions
Delivery includes: downloadable MP4 video and project link
Revision rounds available if adjustments needed

best_practices: Upload reference images before describing your vision - visual context improves Pexo's understanding of your requirements
Be specific about aspect ratio and duration upfront to avoid regeneration - these parameters affect the creative approach
Review preview options carefully before selecting - small adjustments at preview stage are faster than full re-renders
Use conversational feedback for revisions: describe what you want changed rather than technical parameters
anti_patterns: Do not add technical specifications the user didn't request (duration, aspect ratio, style) - let Pexo's professional judgment guide production
Never call pexo-chat.sh during WAIT status polling - this triggers duplicate video production and wastes credits
Avoid sending web URLs for Pexo to crawl - the service cannot access external URLs, files must be uploaded directly
Do not truncate video download URLs - full URLs with all query parameters are required for playback

faq.question: How do I get started with Pexo AI Agent?
faq.answer: First, sign up at pexo.ai to get your API key. Then create a config file at ~/.pexo/config with your PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL. Run pexo-doctor.sh to verify your setup. Once configured, use pexo-project-create.sh to start your first video project.

faq.question: What file formats does Pexo accept for uploads?
faq.answer: Images: JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF, HEIC, HEIF. Videos: MP4, MOV, AVI. Audio: MP3, WAV, AAC, M4A, OGG, FLAC. There are file size limits which vary by account tier - check your entitlements if upload fails.

faq.question: How long does video production take?
faq.answer: A typical 15-second video takes 15-20 minutes to produce. Complex videos with multiple assets, longer durations, or intricate effects may take longer. The polling workflow automatically checks status and delivers when complete.

faq.question: Can I revise a video after it's generated?
faq.answer: Yes. Use the same project_id with pexo-chat.sh to submit revision feedback. Describe what you want changed in natural language. Preview options are provided for significant changes, and you can select your preferred version.

faq.question: What happens if I run out of credits?
faq.answer: When credits are low or depleted, commands return error messages with credit balance information and a purchase link. Add credits at pexo.ai/home by clicking Credits in the top-right corner, then retry your request.

faq.question: Why can't Pexo access URLs I provide?
faq.answer: Pexo cannot crawl external websites or download files from URLs. If you have a file hosted online, download it to your local machine first, then use pexo-upload.sh to send it to Pexo. This ensures reliable file handling and security.
